name: llmlab-public
description: Public snapshot of LLMLab.ee, an AI-focused PC build configurator for Estonian market pricing.

scripts.db:audit: curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $ADMIN_API_TOKEN" http://localhost:3000/api/db/audit | python3 -m json.tool || echo 'Run `npm run dev` first and set ADMIN_API_TOKEN'
scripts.db:backfill-price-history: curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $ADMIN_API_TOKEN" http://localhost:3000/api/db/backfill-price-history | python3 -m json.tool || echo 'Run `npm run dev` first and set ADMIN_API_TOKEN'
